media.alt_text: A Needoh stress squeeze fidget in the shape of a piece of cake.

author.description: This is the official X account of the Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tweets.text: Knead your needoh on the plane? It’s a peace o’ cake if they’re 3.4 oz or less. If an item contains materials you can pump, squeeze, spread, smear, spray or spill they need to follow our carry-on liquids rule.
tweets.text_resolved: Knead your needoh on the plane? It’s a peace o’ cake if they’re 3.4 oz or less. If an item contains materials you can pump, squeeze, spread, smear, spray or spill they need to follow our carry-on liquids rule.

tweets.text:
With severe weather moving in across many parts of the country, be sure to follow our friends at @FAANews. They share daily ✈️traffic reports + helpful info on how storms affect flights.

Reminder: Always check with your airport & airline first for possible delays.

card.name: summary
card.title: Travel Checklist | Transportation Security Administration
card.description: The TSA Travel Checklist provides essential steps for travelers to ensure a smooth airport experience.

author.description: This is the official X account of the Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tweets.text:
Gotta catch ‘em all PSA from TSA:

🔥Arrive EARLY

🔥Bring a REAL ID

🔥EVERYTHING out of your pockets before screening begins

🔥Shoes ON (unless they alarm, or you're asked to remove them)

🔥Some X-rays allow you to keep liquids and electronics in your carry-on, others don't
tweets.text_resolved:
Gotta catch ‘em all PSA from TSA:

🔥Arrive EARLY

🔥Bring a REAL ID

🔥EVERYTHING out of your pockets before screening begins

🔥Shoes ON (unless they alarm, or you're asked to remove them)

🔥Some X-rays allow you to keep liquids and electronics in your carry-on, others don't

author.description: This is the official X account of the Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tweets.text: You have options before choosing to voluntarily abandon a prohibited item. You can take it out to your vehicle, leave it with a non-traveling companion, or place it in a checked bag. Best option is to not bring these items in your carry-on. Always start packing with an empty bag. https://t.co/EHJSwIliDh
tweets.text_resolved: You have options before choosing to voluntarily abandon a prohibited item. Always start packing with an empty bag. https://t.co/EHJSwIliDh

author.description: This is the official X account of the Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tweets.text:
Summer travel season is officially taking off. ✈️

This Memorial Day Weekend, give yourself some extra time at the airport, double-check your bags for prohibited items, and have your REAL ID/acceptable ID ready.
tweets.text_resolved:
Summer travel season is officially taking off. ✈️

This Memorial Day Weekend, give yourself some extra time at the airport, double-check your bags for prohibited items, and have your REAL ID/acceptable ID ready.

author.description: This is the official X account of the Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tweets.text:
If you’re heading out for a Memorial Day Weekend vacay, remember:  

TSA Officers across the country are working hard to keep skies safe. Harassment, threats, or physical violence will not be tolerated. This can lead to fines, removal from the airport, and yes, even arrest.
